title: adonis microcarpa subsp. microcarpa
intro: Adonis microcarpa subsp. microcarpa, commonly known as the Adonis or Red Poppy, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Paeoniaceae family, native to the mountainous regions of Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects, making it a potential treatment for various health issues. The health benefits of Adonis microcarpa subsp. microcarpa include its ability to alleviate symptoms of respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate pain. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea or tincture, and its herbal preparations are also used in combination with other herbs to create medicinal remedies.
